notes: This registry names the first bounded coverage contracts that the local salt_ndepend gate must satisfy.
Seeded contracts keep the restart gate honest even before the command surfaces exist.

contracts.proof_obligation: Repo-wide code-quality baseline must remain an explicit packeted prerequisite for user-visible behavior claims.
notes: Backfills the seeded code-quality baseline into the contract-backed family-parity gate.

contracts.proof_obligation: Heuristic coverage can remain only as an input, but it must still be explicitly packeted and fail visible before product work resumes.
notes: Backfills the seeded coverage-audit baseline into the contract-backed family-parity gate.

contracts.proof_obligation: Native helper regression proof remains mandatory packet authority for user-visible behavior changes.
notes: Backfills the seeded native helper baseline into the contract-backed family-parity gate.

contracts.proof_obligation: Published-runtime availability must remain an explicit contract-backed prerequisite rather than an assumed setup detail.
notes: Backfills the seeded runtime publish baseline into the contract-backed family-parity gate.

contracts.proof_obligation: Headless published-runtime probe and session lanes must stay contract-visible packet inputs before any user-visible behavior closeout.
notes: Backfills the seeded runtime probe/session baseline into the contract-backed family-parity gate.

contracts.proof_obligation: Artifact-producing runtime tool lanes remain explicit contract-backed packet inputs instead of hidden side tasks.
notes: Backfills the seeded runtime artifact-tools baseline into the contract-backed family-parity gate.

contracts.proof_obligation: Any user-visible slider or direct numeric color-pipeline edit must carry deterministic native coverage, published-runtime UI witness coverage, and packeted parity or family-parity proof before closeout.
notes: Seed contract only. The actual family packet is still missing and therefore keeps the freeze gate open.

contracts.proof_obligation: Any user-visible advanced-color function switch must carry deterministic native coverage, published-runtime witnesses, and a green packeted parity case before closeout.
notes: Anchors the existing headless source-function switch runtime witness as a first-class blocker contract instead of a chat-only detail.

contracts.proof_obligation: Any user-visible advanced-color shape-stack edit must carry deterministic native coverage, published-runtime witnesses, and a green packeted parity case before closeout.
notes: Anchors the existing headless add-row runtime witness as a first-class blocker contract instead of a chat-only side detail.

contracts.proof_obligation: Any user-visible advanced-color draft invalidation or resynchronization path must carry deterministic native coverage, published-runtime witnesses, and a green packeted parity case before closeout.
notes: Anchors the existing loaded-state override invalidation witness as a first-class blocker contract instead of leaving it implicit.

contracts.proof_obligation: Runtime-walk playback controls must remain explicit packeted proof for user-visible viewer behavior claims, not a hidden runtime_ui_harness side effect.
notes: Anchors the existing replay, pause, and step viewer witness as a first-class blocker contract.

contracts.proof_obligation: Runtime-walk viewer tolerance of missing companion FITS inputs must remain explicit packeted proof for user-visible viewer behavior claims.
notes: Anchors the existing missing-companion-FITS viewer witness as a first-class blocker contract.

contracts.proof_obligation: FITS-only runtime-walk boot and export behavior must remain explicit packeted proof for user-visible viewer behavior claims.
notes: Anchors the existing FITS-only viewer boot witness as a first-class blocker contract instead of leaving it implicit.

contracts.proof_obligation: Viewer-backed runtime witness families remain mandatory packet inputs for any user-visible behavior claim.
notes: Reflects the existing named public rails in .vscode/tasks.json.

contracts.proof_obligation: The gate cannot close while hostile review, receipts, and packet authority remain optional or chat-only.
notes: Keeps workflow closeout bound to the same packet authority story instead of a separate informal checklist.
